# Hi there 👋🏼

DevOps / Platform Engineering — Suisse (Genève/Vaud)

## Facts
- Primary language: French (EN secondary)
- Focus: Infrastructure automation, platform reliability, reproducible delivery
- Domains: IT Infrastructure, DevOps, Platform Engineering

## Current Focus
- AWX / AAP credentials plugins
- Event-Driven Ansible + XL Release orchestration
- Performance troubleshooting on Apriso Job Executor (.NET Framework 4.8)
- Proxmox-based lab acceleration for testing and validation
